mechanics.excerpt: Small and lightweight; they are capa: ble of devastating damage- grenades are usually thrown_ they are also one of the few weapons that rely on both the skill and the strength of the user. There are thousands of different grenades, though they fit into just few main categories and all share tne same game mechanics All grenades cause blast damage (p. 118) ad can be thrown over obstacles as a indi- rect (p; 119) attack.
